citi-lounge-seating-3-sizes-available.notes: Model codes: 7875 = single chair (30"W x 31"D x 30"H, 66 lbs), 7876 = two-seat sofa (50.5"W x 31"D x 30"H), 7877 = three-seat sofa (72"W x 31"D x 30"H). Weight capacity not published for this line. Weight for 2- and 3-seat variants not found.

gc-comet-bariatric-stacking-armchair-gc2.notes: Missing field: weight (lbs). Checked manufacturer page, desksplus.com, officecentralinteriors.com, and PDF brochure listing — no chair weight found anywhere. Dimensions (31.5"W x 27"D x 38"H) and weight capacity (500 lbs) already in specs.json. Chair weight omitted to avoid guessing.

global-recliner-primacare-gc3608mrc.notes: Dimensions 30"W x 39"D x 46.5"H from chairlines.com; weight 98 lbs and weight_capacity 300 lbs from offisavvy.com. Note: offisavvy lists slightly different dims (29.5"W x 34.5"D x 45.5"H) — chairlines likely more authoritative for the MRC full-arm recliner variant. GC3608MRC is the Motion Recliner with Companion (full arm) variant.

multi-storage-cabinet-93365msl.notes: Missing field: weight_capacity. Grand & Toy page for 93365MSL shows product weight 158–162 lbs but no drawer/cabinet load capacity. Global does not publish this spec for the 9300 Multi-Stor line. Omitting to avoid fabricating data.

premium-series-lateral-file-cabinet-2-3-.notes: Prime lateral file 36"W model codes confirmed: GULF20G1836P (2-drawer, 28"H), GULF30G1836P (3-drawer, 39.2"H), GULF40G1836P (4-drawer, 49.6"H), GULF50G1836P (5-drawer pattern). Weight and weight_capacity not published on available product pages. 2-drawer model weight ~122 lbs confirmed from digitalbuyer.com for 1900-Plus sibling line (Global does not publish Prime-specific weights by drawer count).

robust-high-back-multi-tilter-chair-500l.notes: Weight 118 lbs confirmed from ugoburo.ca product page for the Global Robust 2526 (same chair as GLB74475). No other source corroborated this exact figure — treat as confirmed but note it is from a single dealer listing.

sidero-guest-chair-28-colour-options.notes: Model 6900 = standard armchair (GL-6900), 6900C = with casters, 6923 = healthcare vinyl variant (GC6923), SID501/502/503/505 = beam seating variants. Dimensions 25.5"W x 24"D x 32"H from officeanything.com. Weight and weight_capacity not published for this line.

sirena-lounge-chair-3371.notes: Dimensions 30.5"W x 29.5"D x 28.5"H and weight 52 lbs confirmed from ugoburo.ca. Additional seat measurements: seat width 20", seat height 17.5", seat depth 20", arm height 25". Weight capacity not published.

terina-training-tables-rectangular-table.notes: 8 rectangular model codes confirmed matching '8 sizes' in BBI title: 24"D variants (GFT2454R, GFT2460R) and 30"D variants (GFT3048R through GFT3078R). All 29"H. Weight and weight_capacity not published on available product pages.

aktivity-environ-table.notes: Model code prefix EN + top size (e.g. EN3636 = 36"x36"). Weight capacity 50 lbs (22.68 kg) confirmed from Grand & Toy listing for standard Aktivity classroom table (BAT2448). Environ shares same construction standard. Product weight (shipping) not found.

aktivity-puddle.notes: Weight capacity 50 lbs (22.68 kg) inferred from Grand & Toy ANSI-spec listing for Aktivity line (BAT2448). Puddle table shares same 1" 45lb HD particleboard, 16-ga steel tube frame construction. No direct Puddle weight capacity spec found — using line standard. Product weight not published.

anti-fatigue-wellness-mat-36-x-24-5.notes: Weight 4.58 lbs (2077.45 g), warranty 5-year limited, country China — all confirmed from Grand & Toy product page for model 8707002. Weight capacity not applicable for floor mats (static surface, no load rating). No GREENGUARD or other certifications found for this product line.

array-stand-as-air-purifier-1.notes: Shipping weight 49 lbs (49.16 lbs) from webstaurantstore.com listing for AS2 (5884501). Warranty confirmed: 3-year on sensors/display, 5-year on remaining parts. Weight capacity not applicable for air purifiers. No ETL, UL, CARB certifications confirmed in product listing. Country of manufacture not found.

auditorium-lecture-hall-seating.notes: Weight capacity 300 lbs per seat confirmed from Global pedestal seating series page: 'All pedestal seating is tested to an active weight capacity of 300lbs per seat.' Specific model codes for BBI's auditorium/lecture hall configuration not surfaced — 10+ series available (mesh, upholstered, non-upholstered). Dimensions and finishes vary per series. BBI should confirm which specific Global pedestal series is in their catalog.

No 42"H round table model code found with high confidence. Confidence low — BBI should confirm supplier.
